name: Claude Sonnet 4.5
note: Best coding/agent Sonnet at release, reported to sustain focus on complex tasks for 30+ hours.

results.notes: SWE-bench Verified, averaged over 10 trials, 200K thinking budget; confirmed via search corroboration of the official announcement (77.2%, 'best score any Claude model had gotten at the time')
GPQA Diamond; confirmed via direct fetch

multilingual Q&A (MMMLU); confirmed via direct fetch [Corrected during full-corpus audit: Existing value (89.1) came from leanware.co's third-party recap of Sonnet 4.5's launch chart. Anthropic's own Claude Sonnet 4.6 System Card (Table 2.1.A, directly fetched) re-reports Sonnet 4.5's score on this same benchmark as 89.5%. Note this benchmark is actually MMMLU (Multilingual MMLU, 57 subjects x 14 non-English languages) rather than single-language MMLU; the existing entry's notes alread]
Terminal-Bench 2.0 (default thinking, no set effort level). Reported as a Sonnet 4.5 comparison figure in the Claude Sonnet 4.6 System Card, Table 2.1.A / Figure 2.3.A.
τ²-bench Telecom domain, Sonnet 4.5 comparison figure, Table 2.1.A. (Sonnet 4.5 also scored 86.2% on the Retail sub-domain, which has no matching taxonomy slug distinct from tau-bench.)

OSWorld-Verified, first-attempt success rate. Confirmed both in Sonnet 4.6 System Card Table 2.1.A/Figure 2.6.A (Sonnet 4.5 column = 61.4%) and independently in Sonnet 4.5's own launch announcement, which cites the same figure.
ARC-AGI-2 (Verified). Sonnet 4.5 does not support the later adaptive-thinking/effort parameter, so this max-configuration figure from Table 2.1.A is its only reported ARC-AGI-2 score.
GDPval-AA Elo, Sonnet 4.5 comparison figure, Table 2.1.A / Figure 2.8.A.
MMMU-Pro, reasoning-only (no tools) configuration, averaged over 5 runs (Figure 2.17.2.A). With an image-cropping tool, Sonnet 4.5 scored 68.9%.
CharXiv Reasoning, no-tools configuration (Figure 2.17.3.A). With an image-cropping tool, Sonnet 4.5 scored 69.9%.
Humanity's Last Exam, with-tools configuration (Figure 2.20.2.A). Without tools, Sonnet 4.5 scored 17.7%.

verificationNotes: Real model, confirmed via anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-4-5 (release 2025-09-29, $3/$15 pricing, 200K context, 30+ hour focus claim). GPQA/MMLU rows confirmed verbatim via direct fetch of leanware.co. IMPORTANT CORRECTION: input record marked status='deprecated', but Anthropic's official model-deprecations page (fetched 2026-07-12) lists claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 as 'Active' with tentative retirement 'not sooner than 2026-09-29' — this model is currently live, not deprecated. Status corrected to 'released' (closest enum to 'Active'); apiAvailable=true confirmed correct.
